name: golden hour
tagline: a candle + prints, all warm-toned. once they sell, they're gone.
story: a tiny collection built around the last hour of a good day. a soy candle poured in small batches — amber, fig, a curl of woodsmoke — and a pair of prints in the same warm light. each candle batch smells a shade different; the pour doesn't repeat.

name: monsoon
tagline: deep blues, indigo skies, rainy-day picks. dropping when the first rain comes.
story: a quiet collection waiting on the weather. when the first real monsoon rain hits, we open the drop. indigo, slate, deep teal. fifteen pieces. you'll know when.

name: winter '23 — wool & smoke
tagline: twenty pieces in undyed neutrals and woodsmoke grey. sold out march 2024.
story: our first winter collection. twenty pieces, ten in undyed neutrals, ten in woodsmoke grey. it took us six weeks to make. it took six days to sell.

name: summer '23 — sun-bleached
tagline: eight pieces, sun-warm tones, palm fronds. sold out july 2023.
story: a small run built around three days of goa sun. everything came back a colour we couldn't quite name. eight pieces.
